name: Slide Room
description: This small chamber appears to have once been part of a coal mining operation. Etched into the south wall are the words 'Granite Wall', recorded with the confidence of someone closing an issue rather than solving it. A long passage extends to the east, while a steep metal slide twists downward, offering a one-way solution to vertical movement. A small opening to the north provides an alternative route, less efficient but easier to reconsider.
